title: Stopwatch & Timer
seoDescription: Set a countdown timer with hours, minutes, and seconds. Start, pause, and reset the timer as needed. This free online timer is perfect for cooking, workouts, study sessions, and productivity timing.
step1Desc: Select between Stopwatch and Timer modes. Use Stopwatch to measure elapsed time going up from zero. Use Timer for a countdown that goes down to zero.
step2Desc: In Timer mode, set your desired countdown time using the hours, minutes, and seconds inputs. Use the up/down arrows to adjust values quickly.
step3Desc: Click the Start button to begin. You can pause at any time, then resume from where you left off. Click Reset to clear all time and start fresh.
featureDual: Dual mode: Stopwatch and Countdown Timer
featureNoInstall: No installation required - works in browser
useFitness: Fitness: Interval training, stretching timers, running pace
useStudy: Study: Pomodoro technique, exam practice, reading time
useWork: Work: Meeting timers, focus sessions, break management
faqSoundQ: Can I turn off the timer sound?
faqSoundA: Yes, disable browser notifications or mute your system volume.
faqMobileA: Yes, fully optimized for smartphones and tablets.
faqAccuracyA: Yes, uses high-precision browser timers accurate to milliseconds.
